name: Light Pill #3 - The Mirror Walker
description: The Mirror Walker - A glowing capsule that reveals the truth behind reflections to those who dare to face themselves. Part of the Light Pill Project: surreal, mystical experiences for those who embrace the unknown.

attributes.value: Hand mirror that shows what's behind you
The reflection knows what the face tries to hide.
You must walk backward through the hall and speak only to reflections. When you meet your own eyes in the glass, ask the question you fear to answer.
Must be taken while facing a mirror

properties.ai_prompt: Surreal fashion editorial of The Mirror Walker in a hall of infinite mirrors, wearing a reversible silver-and-onyx cloak that shifts with movement, holding a hand mirror that reflects the unseen. Quicksilver aura with Reflective Surface energy, chromed leather boots, infinite reflections creating complex patterns, cinematic lighting that plays with reality and illusion, 8K, hyperdetailed with mirror distortions and reflections.
